name: Granicus Government Digital Communications API
what_it_does: Granicus REST API for government digital communications and constituent engagement platform. Enables AI agents to manage government subscriber list and constituent communication management for civic engagement, handle GovDelivery email and SMS broadcast campaign creation and delivery, access meeting management and legislative agenda publication workflow, retrieve government streaming video and council meeting recording management, manage permit and service request workflow automation for digital government services, handle constituent feedback and survey management, access public record and content publication workflow, retrieve performance analytics for government digital communication effectiveness, manage government website content management and digital accessibility, and integrate civic engagement data with CRM, HRIS, and government ERP platforms.
use_cases: Sending government constituent notifications from civic engagement agents
Managing public meeting agendas from government workflow agents
Publishing public records from government transparency agents
Analyzing civic engagement metrics from government analytics agents
not_for: Private sector customer communications without government and civic engagement context
Consumer social media without government constituent management requirements
Enterprise marketing without government compliance and accessibility standards
best_when: A government agency using Granicus wants AI agents to automate constituent communications, public meeting management, digital service delivery, and civic engagement reporting.
avoid_when: GOVERNMENT COMPLIANCE RISK: Government communications must comply with ADA Section 508 accessibility requirements and state-specific public records laws — automated content must be reviewed for compliance. GovDelivery mass email requires CAN-SPAM compliance. Public meeting automation must maintain legal notice requirements for public comment periods.

auth.notes: Granicus uses API key and OAuth 2.0 authentication. Per-agency API credentials. Developer portal at developer.granicus.com. GovDelivery, govMeetings, govAccess, and govService have separate API surfaces. Webhooks for subscriber and meeting events. FedRAMP compliant. ADA/Section 508 compliant platform. Largest government digital communications platform in North America.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual government subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; subscriber volume and product modules determine pricing
pricing.notes: Denver, Colorado. Founded 1999. Private ($1.5B valuation, Vista Equity Partners). Government digital communications market. 7,000+ government agencies. GovDelivery acquired (2016). Legistar (legislative management), govMeetings, govService, govAccess product suite. Serves federal, state, and local government. FedRAMP authorized. Competes with Tyler Technologies for government technology market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; GovDelivery broadcast limits per subscription

known_agent_gotchas: GOVERNMENT COMPLIANCE: Automated government communications must comply with ADA Section 508 accessibility and CAN-SPAM; all automated content requires compliance review
Multi-product API surface — Granicus GovDelivery, govMeetings, govService, and govAccess have separate API endpoints and auth; select correct product API for use case
Public records law — automated content publication must comply with state public records laws; some jurisdictions require manual approval before public record creation
FedRAMP environment — federal agency customers may require FedRAMP-authorized deployment; verify environment requirement before integration planning
Subscriber opt-out — CAN-SPAM compliance requires automated opt-out processing; implement unsubscribe handling for all GovDelivery broadcast automation
Agency approval workflows — government content automation often requires human approval chain for official communications; respect configured approval workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Government digital communications. FedRAMP, SOC2, CJIS, Section 508. API key/OAuth2. US. Constituent contact and government communications data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Govtech communications. FedRAMP, SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Constituent and government data.
